programs.title: Behkaway
programs.desc:
In a world where desires blur the lines between right and wrong, one man’s pursuit of happiness sets off a chain of irreversible consequences.
Zubair, a middle-aged man hardened by ego and entitlement, rules over his household with an iron hand. His wife, Zeenat, bears the weight of his injustices in silence, enduring not only his coldness but the cruelty of his mother and sister. Despite her unwavering love and devotion, Zeenat receives nothing but pain in return.
But everything begins to shift when Zubair encounters Sitara, a young, captivating woman whose charm ignites a dangerous spark within him. Driven by selfish desires, Zubair makes a decision that sets off a ripple effect far beyond his control.
Will Zubair abandon Zeenat after meeting Sitara? Will his decision have consequences for his family? And will Sitara prove to be a blessing or a nightmare in disguise for him?
7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programs.title: Humrahi
programs.desc:
What begins as a series of light-hearted yet unpleasant encounters between Sayhaan and Elif eventually blossoms into an unexpected and deep-rooted love. Just as they begin to find their footing together, the life of Sayhaan Ghazi is suddenly upended by a storm he did not create. When an unforeseen crisis strikes, the two pillars of his existence—his devoted love, Elif, and his formidable father—are forced to face an impossible ultimatum.
Driven by a desperate, protective instinct, they make a difficult choice to shield him from a reality they believe would be his undoing. However, this well-intentioned sacrifice triggers a catastrophic chain of events, turning their home into a place of chilling distance and lifelong regret. It is a haunting exploration of how the choices made for those we love can ultimately become the very walls that permanently divide a family.
Will Sayhaan’s journey forward be defined by the choices others made, or will he find a way to reclaim his own destiny? What does life look like for Elif and Sayhaan’s father when the person they tried to protect can no longer look them in the eye?
Director &

programs.title: Khush Naseebi
programs.desc:
Khush Naseebi is a heartfelt story of Siraj Qasmi and his three daughters, Narmeen, Maheen, and Emaan.
Siraj Qasmi is a widower who loves his daughters deeply. Narmeen and Maheen are the light of his life, but his heart remains distant from his youngest, Emaan. He carries a silent belief that her birth took away his wife, and that shadow has never left their relationship.
In the same neighborhood lives Humayun, a hardworking tailor and Siraj’s favorite. He quietly loves Narmeen, but keeps his feelings hidden, believing he is not worthy of her.
Like every father, Siraj dreams of seeing his daughters happily married. But before he can fulfill this wish, destiny knocks on his door.
What does fate have in store for Siraj Qasmi? Will Humayun finally confess his love to Narmeen? And will Narmeen ever realize how deeply he loves her?
Geo Entertainment Presentation

programs.title: Sara Aapi
programs.desc:
Sara Aapi is the story of a woman who sacrificed her dreams and the most precious years of her youth to give her three brothers the best upbringing.
After the sudden death of her parents, Sara takes control of both the family and the business. She turns them into success stories, but at the cost of her own personal life. Her world revolves around her brothers, Burhan, Adnan, and Usman.
Over time, Sara becomes strict and commanding. Her decisions become law inside the house. But her strongest test begins when her brothers’ personal desires rise against her authority. Soon, tensions grow and loyalties are tested.
Will Sara choose her authority over her family? Will Sara’s brothers rebel against her decisions? Can Sara keep her family together?
7th Sky Entertainment Presentation

programs.title: Rang De
programs.desc:
This is the story of Dua, a lively and strong young girl who lives with her mother, Nudrat, and her grandmother, Noor Bahar.
After losing her father at a young age, Dua grows up watching her mother struggle as a widow. She becomes her mother’s strength, working alongside Nudrat and Noor Bahar while also running her own vlogging channel. Life is not easy, but Dua faces it with courage.
Then she makes a decision that shakes everyone around her. Dua wants her mother to marry again. In a society where such choices are questioned, her bold step brings whispers, judgment, and resistance.
At the same time, Ahad, a young man who runs an antique shop with his mother Samina, crosses paths with Dua. Their families are already connected through work, but their meeting soon becomes something more personal. Before Dua and Ahad realize it, they begin to fall for each other, but circumstances take an unexpected turn.
Will Dua be able to face society’s judgment for getting her mother married again? Will Dua and Ahad complete their love story? By choosing happiness for her mother, is Dua unknowingly changing her own life forever?
7th Sky Entertainment Presentation
